# NichePulse Pro — Exclusive Files

These files are NOT in the free GitHub repo. Pro Bundle only.

## Contents

├── niche-research-pro/          # Enhanced Niche Research skill with live data
│   ├── SKILL.md                 # Pro version with Etsy/Google Trends API calls
│   └── data/
│       ├── niche-database.json   # Extended database — 50+ niches (vs 14 free)
│       ├── seasonal-calendar.json # Monthly trend data for every niche
│       └── competitor-tracker.md  # Auto-updated competitor analysis
├── seo-audit-pro/                # Enhanced SEO skill
│   ├── SKILL.md                 # Pro version with live web_search integration
│   └── keyword-templates/       # 20+ keyword research templates
├── content-pipeline-pro/         # Enhanced content pipeline
│   ├── SKILL.md                 # Pro version with platform-specific A/B testing
│   └── templates/               # Ready-to-use content templates
│       ├── x-thread-templates.md
│       ├── linkedin-templates.md
│       ├── email-sequences.md
│       └── blog-outlines.md
├── roadmaps/                     # 90-day launch roadmaps for top niches

│   ├── native-plants.md
│   ├── trail-running.md
